More AUVIC Team Members

Goals for this year's Robosub competition

To successfully prequalify for the 2026 Robosub competition and secure our place among the top teams.

To build a submarine capable of completing every task at competition with consistency, precision, and reliability.

To inspire the next generation of team leads to return next year and improve on the results of this year.

To follow our competition plan closely and execute each objective effectively to achieve the highest score possible.

This year the team has collaborated well to design, assemble, and code the best vehicle possible. The mechanical team has created a fully capable platform able to perform all of the required tasks at competition. The electrical team has created a bulletproof electrical system able to handle a more agile and complicated submarine. The software team has been working hard to create a reliable navigation and computer vision pipeline. Working together, the team hopes to perform at the highest level at this year's competition.

© AUVIC University of Victoria 2026
